RIVENDALE'S

Fine Coffees and Teas



"The coffeeshop of the Collective"


R.I.P.



This is the first time I've been able to make the appropriate corrections to the Rivendale's Homepage. Bill Bush (Evil Man) has given us a very hard boot out the door, and we're not very sure why. We do know that we have no legal recourse, having trusted the man and having neglected to make a sound lease.

Bill Bush now has a beautifully refinished room and outfittings for his very own coffeeshop (and my daisy table) at the expense of our hard work and dreams. His god is Money. We hope he enjoys himself, and that he rots in Hell.




Bill Bush is an Evil Man. Here are some other evil men in history:
  • Hitler
    • true stuff
    • lies, lies, lies


  • Satan
    • Church of Satan
    • Internet Altar of Unholy Blasphemy


  • Newt Gingrich
    • Newt Bites
    • Unofficial Monsieur Newt Page


For comments, suggestions or scathing criticisms email Thaïs Perkins at: Perkins@opal.mgh.harvard.edu
